get.description: One greenhouse's latest optimizer cycle plus the Go-API-composed proposed-vs-current-vs-bounds setpoint diff (frontend data model §Optimizer plans, key ["optimizer-plan", id]) — the data behind the detail view's OptimizerPlanPanel. `plan` is null on a pre-planner held cycle, in which case `diff` is null too. Polled, not streamed. Open to anyone — reads need no token (anonymous-viewer posture, platform security §4).

200.description: The latest plan detail for the greenhouse.
